name: suit-build
description: Use when building, validating, or scaffolding skills in this monorepo. Triggers: "validate skills", "build suit-build", "scaffold a new skill", "init a hook/agent/rules/plugin", "run suit-build", or any work on the multi-harness skill emission pipeline (Claude Code, APM, Codex, Gemini, Copilot CLI, Pi targets).
